title: Fan speed does not follow expected thermal table under GPU stress
customer_impact: Potential thermal policy failure under high GPU workload
recommended_action: Confirm latest Thermal fan table delivery and BIOS integration status

title: Redfish sensor inventory missing GPU temperature field
recommended_action: Check BMC telemetry mapping and GPU sensor source

title: OS image missing storage controller driver package
recommended_action: Update driver package and regenerate OS image

title: PCIe device enumeration unstable after warm reboot
customer_impact: Potential device availability issue after reboot
recommended_action: Secure failing system for BIOS and EE debug

title: Factory diagnostic tool cannot read BMC firmware version
customer_impact: No direct customer impact, but factory readiness is incomplete
recommended_action: Align BMC version query interface with diagnostic tool owner

title: Secure Boot default setting does not match customer requirement
recommended_action: Confirm customer default policy and update BIOS setup default if required

title: Long-run stress test fails after 72 hours with intermittent system hang
customer_impact: System stability risk under sustained workload
recommended_action: Collect BIOS, BMC, OS, driver, and stress logs for cross-layer triage
